top3.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') - 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%')

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') - 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%')

SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) - 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END)
FROM molecule

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) - 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM molecule

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') - 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%')

SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) - 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END)
FROM molecule

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) - 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM molecule

final.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') - 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%')
